title: Inside the Whale Tree
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on inside the whale tree within the Inside the Whale Tree storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kaido ?!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: And as for all of us, Lord Oden's humble retainers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: To his very last breath, he voluntarily succeeded in protecting us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kaidou...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The "hundred beast pirate crew",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: led by the yonko Kaido, is presently ...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Occupying the Wano Kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...! If you prefer not to answer this, then so be it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: What the hell did your guys' boss do to get executed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You can't possibly tell me that it's not related...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to the reason why you all have been targeted and captured, can you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Indeed... it is just as you stated in your conjecture. The weight of our sin is immense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kaido was... attempting to extract "information" from us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The previous Daimyou,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Lord Oden Kouzuki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Along with the "pirate King", gold Roger himself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: completed the arduous journey to the final island, rafted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our Lord was privy to the "secrets" of that world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The story suddenly shifts... to the legendary treasure "One piece"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Eeeeh HH...?!

summary: Inside the Whale Tree: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
